zh.Of, Lanherne, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾藍黑爾
zh.St Ervan, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 艾萬
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Soor於1272年出生時，她的父親John le Soor22歲，母親Rosea Lansladron18歲。她於1289年與Sir John Arundell I在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1319年在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.St Ervan, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 艾萬
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Soor于1272年出生时，她的父亲John le Soor22岁，母亲Rosea Lansladron18岁。她于1289年与Sir John Arundell I在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1319年在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Soor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Indian (Panjab): Sikh, found among Ramgarhia Sikhs.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Soor was born in 1272, her father, John le Soor, was 22 and her mother, Rosea Lansladron, was 18. She married Sir John Arundell I in 1289, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1319, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Soor est née en 1272, son père, John le Soor, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Rosea Lansladron, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Arundell I en 1289, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1319, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Soor 1272 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John le Soor 22 und ihre Mutter Rosea Lansladron 18. Sie hat 1289 in Cornwall, England Sir John Arundell I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1319 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Lanherne, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Soor è nata il nel 1272, sua padre, John le Soor, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Rosea Lansladron, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Arundell I nel 1289, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1319, nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Soorが1272年に生まれた時，父John le Soorは22歳，母Rosea Lansladronは18歳であった。1289年にイギリスコルンワルでSir John Arundell Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1319年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Soor(이)가 1272년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John le Soor(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rosea Lansladron(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1289년 영국 코른월에서 Sir John Arundell I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1319년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Of, Lanherne, Cornwall, England: Lanherne, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Soor nasceu em 1272, seu pai, John le Soor, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Rosea Lansladron, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Arundell I em 1289, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1319, em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Soor родилась в 1272 г., её отцу по имени John le Soor было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Rosea Lansladron, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Arundell I в 1289 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1319 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Soor nació en 1272, su papá, John le Soor, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Rosea Lansladron, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir John Arundell I en 1289, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1319, en Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
